storage_extensions.usage: mmap nation_code.bin; use nation_code[l_suppkey] as the aggregation nation key instead of rebuilding supplier+nation lookups at runtime
mmap year_idx.bin; use year_idx[l_orderkey] as the precomputed o_year offset from 1992 and skip orders_pk_dense, o_orderkey, and o_orderdate lookups in the hot loop
mmap both files; probe slots [l_partkey * 4, l_partkey * 4 + 4) and match l_suppkey to fetch supplycost without rebuilding a green-only partsupp structure

join_order.notes: Test part_name_green_bitset[l_partkey] first and discard non-green rows before any other lookup.
Use the prebuilt dense suppkey->nation_code array and remove runtime supplier+nation join setup.
Probe the four fixed slots for each partkey directly from the persistent dense payload instead of scanning partsupp or probing the 192 MB partsupp hash.
Use the prebuilt dense orderkey->year_idx array so order-year extraction is a single byte lookup.

data_structures.fact_join: dense uint8_t `suppkey->nation_code` array + dense4 int32 `(suppkey, supplycost_scaled)` payload indexed by `partkey * 4` + dense uint8_t `orderkey->year_idx` array

indexes.purpose: skip non-green lineitems before any other join work
replace runtime supplier+nation join setup with a single dense byte lookup
replace the cache-exceeding partsupp hash and the runtime green-partsupp build with four cache-shaped direct slots per partkey
replace orders PK and date lookups with a single dense year byte lookup

optimization_notes: The remaining gap comes from a storage-level mismatch: iteration 1 cut main-scan cost, but it still spends 14 ms in dim_filter and 24 ms rebuilding cache-friendly join state because the available persistent structures do not match Q9's direct-lookup access pattern. This revision uses strategy category E: persist three all-rows dense lookup arrays—a `suppkey -> nation_code` byte map, an `orderkey -> year_idx` byte map, and a `partkey -> 4 x (suppkey, supplycost_i32)` payload—so execution becomes a single sequential lineitem scan with only direct-array probes and per-thread array aggregation, eliminating the runtime partsupp repack and dimension build phases while keeping the hot working set near LLC size.
